name: Lamb Baked in Paper
recipeInstructions:
Note: Lamb shanks may be substituted for leg of lamb.
Wipe the meat with a damp cloth. Make incisions on all sides of the leg or shanks using a small sharp knife. Insert pieces of garlic and cheese into the incisions. Rub the meat with lemon juice, then sprinkle with herbs, salt, and pepper. Wrap the meat securely in heavy paper twice, using greaseproof paper such as cooking parchment or oil brown paper (do not use aluminum foil, as it prevents browning). Tie the package tightly with string.
Bake the leg of lamb for 2 hours and 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C) in an oven. If using lamb shanks, bake for 2 hours.
